mapper.select:
select c.charger_id , c.station_id , c.charger_name , c.charger_type , c.connector_type , c.charging_speed_kw , c.price_per_kwh , c.status as charger_status
, cs.station_name , cs.address , cs.operator_name , cs.station_status from charger c join charging_station cs on c.station_id = cs.station_id where c.charger_id = #{chargerId}

select v.vehicle_id , v.member_id , v.model_id , v.vehicle_nickname , v.plate_number , v.is_default , v.created_at , v.updated_at
, vm.manufacturer , vm.model_name , vm.battery_capacity_kwh , vm.connector_type , vm.max_charging_speed_kw from vehicle v join vehicle_model vm on v.model_id = vm.model_id where v.member_id = #{memberId} order by v.is_default desc, v.vehicle_id asc

select v.vehicle_id , v.member_id , v.model_id , v.vehicle_nickname , v.plate_number , v.is_default , v.created_at , v.updated_at
, vm.manufacturer , vm.model_name , vm.battery_capacity_kwh , vm.connector_type , vm.max_charging_speed_kw from vehicle v join vehicle_model vm on v.model_id = vm.model_id where v.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and v.member_id = #{memberId}

select r.reservation_id , r.member_id , r.vehicle_id , r.charger_id , r.reservation_date , r.start_time , r.end_time , r.current_soc , r.target_soc , r.required_kwh , r.estimated_minutes , r.estimated_cost , r.status , r.verified_at , r.no_show_at , r.canceled_at , r.created_at , r.updated_at
, cs.station_name as "stationName" , cs.address as "stationAddress" , c.charger_name as "chargerName" , c.connector_type as "connectorType" , v.vehicle_nickname as "vehicleNickname" , vm.model_name as "modelName"
from reservation r
join charger c on r.charger_id = c.charger_id
join charging_station cs on c.station_id = cs.station_id
join vehicle v on r.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id
join vehicle_model vm on v.model_id = vm.model_id
where r.reservation_id = #{reservationId} and r.member_id = #{memberId}

select r.reservation_id , r.member_id , r.vehicle_id , r.charger_id , r.reservation_date , r.start_time , r.end_time , r.current_soc , r.target_soc , r.required_kwh , r.estimated_minutes , r.estimated_cost , r.status , r.verified_at , r.no_show_at , r.canceled_at , r.created_at , r.updated_at
, case when current_timestamp between (r.start_time - interval '10 minutes') and r.end_time then true else false end as "verifyAvailable"
, cs.station_name as "stationName" , cs.address as "stationAddress" , c.charger_name as "chargerName" , c.connector_type as "connectorType" , v.vehicle_nickname as "vehicleNickname" , vm.model_name as "modelName"
from reservation r
join charger c on r.charger_id = c.charger_id
join charging_station cs on c.station_id = cs.station_id
join vehicle v on r.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id
join vehicle_model vm on v.model_id = vm.model_id
where r.member_id = #{memberId}
order by r.created_at desc, r.reservation_id desc
mapper.update: update reservation set status = '취소' , canceled_at = current_timestamp , updated_at = current_timestamp where reservation_id = #{reservationId} and member_id = #{memberId} and status = '예약완료'
mapper.select: select reservation_id , member_id , charger_id , reservation_date , start_time , end_time , status from reservation where reservation_id = #{reservationId} and member_id = #{memberId} and status = '예약완료' and current_timestamp between (start_time - interval '10 minutes') and end_time
mapper.update: update reservation set status = '인증완료' , verified_at = current_timestamp , updated_at = current_timestamp where reservation_id = #{reservationId} and member_id = #{memberId} and status = '예약완료'
update reservation set status = '노쇼' , no_show_at = current_timestamp , updated_at = current_timestamp where status = '예약완료' and start_time + interval '10 minutes' <= current_timestamp
update reservation set status = '완료' , updated_at = current_timestamp where status = '인증완료' and end_time <= current_timestamp
update reservation set status = '충전중' , updated_at = current_timestamp where status = '인증완료' and start_time <= current_timestamp and end_time > current_timestamp
update reservation set status = '완료' , updated_at = current_timestamp where status = '충전중' and end_time <= current_timestamp
